2241440.name: Reditus
2241440.description:
The Heremus is a ruined wasteland created after the fall of Corydon Deus.

At its heart lies Vehere—a city of ashes, guarded by a Reditus machine that turns intruders into slaves.

As Augustus, you will push deeper into this forbidden wasteland, uncovering ancient secrets, meeting unforgettable characters, and deciding the fate of a world that refuses to stay dead.

Every ruin hides secrets.

Every shadow hides a threat.

Every desicion could be the last.

Core Mechanics:

  • Exploration & Quests
    Traverse a beautiful UHD 2D semi-open world packed with lore-rich NPCs, branching side quests, and narrative-driven objectives.

  • Strategic Turn-Based Combat
    Combat is dynamic, emphasizing enemy weakness exploitation. Breaking enemy guards through the AMP (Assault Momentum Protocol) system allows for powerful follow-up strikes.

  • Quick Time Events (QTEs)
    Add precision-based depth to combat—parry enemy blows, land critical hits, or activate timed combat bonuses during pivotal moments.

  • Overdrives
    As damage is taken, characters charge unique Overdrive attacks—devastating moves that can dramatically shift the momentum of battle, ideal for boss encounters.

  • Character Progression
    Gain experience, craft and loot equipment, and unlock abilities shaped by fusing one soul with a Fabricius.

  • Robot Recruitment & Arena Battles
    Negotiate with sentient machines in SMT V-style conversations to recruit them to your cause. Each robot comes with unique abilities and personalities. Use them in a dedicated Battle Arena, where they fight in fast-paced, tactical showdowns—collect, train, and master them all.

Other Notable Features:

  • No Random Encounters – Enemies roam the environment, allowing players to strategize before engaging.

  • Loot, Steal, and Craft – A deep item system rewards exploration and clever use of resources.

  • 16-bit SNES-style Sprites & 3D Models – A nostalgic yet modern visual hybrid.

  • PSX-Inspired Soundtrack – Music that echoes the golden era of RPGs.

  • 60–70 Hours of Gameplay – A sprawling, content-rich experience.

  • Mini-Games Galore – A variety of fun distractions woven throughout the main game.

  • Multi-Party Tactical Battles – Manage simultaneous teams in large-scale strategic combat.
